devdoc.details: Holds each launched token's creator-royalty share of the post- graduation swap fee, and lets that creator claim it. LaunchToken's swap fee sends the creator's half of every taxed transfer directly here as a plain ERC20 transfer - there is no separate bookkeeping call, because a token only ever registers one creator and only its own tax mechanism ever sends it here. That means this contract's current balance of a given token IS that creator's unclaimed royalty, which is what claim() reads.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingRoyalty(address).details: Returns the caller's unclaimed royalty balance for a token.

registerToken(address,address).details: Called once by LaunchpadFactory when a new token is created.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

devdoc.title: RoyaltyDistributor
